name: Tameny Inc.
summary: Tameny Inc. provides marriage information and support services in Japan. It offers team marriage and smart marriage program ranging from admission to marriage, and story of concierge services, as well as insurance agent services. The company was formerly known as Partner Agent, Inc. and changed its name to Tameny Inc. in September 2020. Tameny Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
